objective: Implement stage B of the decomposed B4 canonical naming outcome: bind the exact governed Section 3.1 execution-plan inventory to the merged stage A canonical repository contract. Parse and validate only that Markdown section, update only the stale third inventory row from a voice-product classification to the owner-defined AI Development Studio platform classification, and add deterministic production regressions for every required fail-closed structural and semantic mutation. Preserve run 29645564349 and rejected SHA efb22898254563eb75170f1d0c6130e956ec0ba3 as adversarial evidence; do not copy that rejected candidate. Do not implement CLI argument parsing or filesystem error presentation. Claude Code OAuth only; no paid API fallback.

prior_adversarial_evidence.observed_failure: test_plan_url_mismatch accepted a mutated repository URL because plan validation did not bind the complete exact inventory
prior_adversarial_evidence.reuse_policy: design and adversarial evidence only; rejected code must not be copied blindly

production_api_exact.registry_argument: the supplied stage A registry document is authoritative and must actually be used

governed_section_exact.heading: ### 3.1 Verified names and boundaries
governed_section_exact.heading_match: one exact full line at Markdown level 3
governed_section_exact.header: | Role | Canonical repository | Visibility | `main` SHA | Boundary |
governed_section_exact.repository_link_scan_scope: complete raw row before any cell is discarded
governed_section_exact.section_termination: the next Markdown heading of level 1, 2 or 3 or end of document

expected_inventory_rows.boundary_cell: owns governance, schemas, reusable workflows and evidence contracts
owns the minimal downstream skeleton and repeatability tests
owns the automated agentic software-development platform runtime and platform delivery

identity_binding.join_key: exact first-cell label equals registry label
identity_binding.main_sha_rule: each plan SHA cell is an immutable lowercase 40-hex snapshot; it is validated structurally but is not stable canonical identity and is not added to the stage A registry

required_production_regressions: the exact committed execution plan and exact committed registry return an empty list
missing exact section returns plan_section_missing
two exact section headings return plan_section_duplicate
changing the heading from ### to #### returns plan_section_wrong_level
adding any suffix to the heading returns plan_section_heading_suffix
mutating or adding a header column returns plan_header_mismatch
mutating the separator or changing its column count returns plan_separator_mismatch
missing, extra, duplicated or substituted data rows fail with a specific deterministic code
every raw data row with fewer or more than five cells returns plan_row_column_count_mismatch
a canonical five-cell row plus a sixth ordinary cell returns plan_row_column_count_mismatch
a canonical five-cell row plus a sixth cell containing a rogue GitHub repository Markdown link returns plan_row_column_count_mismatch and cannot pass
zero or multiple repository links anywhere in a complete raw row return plan_repository_link_count_mismatch
a repository Markdown link in the label, visibility, SHA or boundary cell returns plan_repository_link_outside_repository_cell
a missing or substituted repository identity returns a specific full-name or URL mismatch code
a visibility mutation returns plan_visibility_mismatch
a non-lowercase, non-hex or non-40-character SHA returns plan_main_sha_invalid
a boundary mutation returns plan_boundary_mismatch
a supplied registry label, URL, visibility or boundary mutation proves the registry argument is used and returns a specific deterministic mismatch code
a non-dict registry, missing canonical_repositories, or non-list canonical_repositories returns registry_input_invalid
a non-string plan input returns plan_input_invalid

documentation_change_exact.only_changed_line: the third Section 3.1 inventory data row
documentation_change_exact.replacement_row: | AI Development Studio platform | [`yurikuchumov-ux/-ai-development-studio`](https://github.com/yurikuchumov-ux/-ai-development-studio) | private | `f6550d4078ffccc952db269081619fdfe57e598c` | owns the automated agentic software-development platform runtime and platform delivery |
